agents.name: DataAgent
agents.description: Responsible for aggregating static alphabet datasets, MediaPipe coordinate pre-computation, and synthetic continuous sequence generation with Hamming distance compression.

agents.name: VisionAgent
agents.description: Responsible for defining coordinate mappings and implementing Relative Coordinate Normalization algorithms (anatomical anchors and dynamic shoulder scaling).

agents.name: MLAgent
agents.description: Responsible for designing and training PyTorch sequential LSTMs and Pose-Encoded Signformer sequence-to-sequence models with proper training loops and Word Error Rate telemetry.

agents.name: AppAgent
agents.description: Responsible for developing the real-time FastAPI + WebSockets server, Three.js 3D avatar skeleton controller, and Web Speech API client synthesis.
